documentation.description:
| Purpose
| This package provides the current day and date as a string.
|
| Modifications
| Author:  Geoff Mendal, Stanford University (original work in CS Parts)
| Modified by Rick Conn for SCATKIT

| Purpose
| Value takes the current CALENDAR.TIME representation
| and returns an external representation. The external representation
| has the following format:
|   Day as a string
|   Comma and space
|   Day as a number
|   Space
|   Month as a string
|   Space
|   Year number
|
|  Example string returned:
|    "Thursday, 9 August 1984"
|
| Exceptions (none)
